## Source: amazon-inspector (44d4a1844921cebc245e39614ba7b999c3890d048ad81429d89d9daf45038ecd)
The package onboarding-server was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9d8938c92b041ecea47a5e8d98398e602ff4f6dfe7ba405bc48f82de2654b5c4)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'onboarding-server' @ 0.1.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
